hero.title: Fast, Private,
hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade VLESS protocol. Up to 3 devices. Instant setup. No logs, no throttling — just pure speed and privacy.

vless.title: VLESS Protocol
vless.desc: Next-gen proxy protocol. Lightweight, fast, and practically undetectable. Works even in restrictive regions.

devices.title: 3 Devices
devices.desc: Connect up to 3 devices simultaneously — phone, laptop, tablet. One subscription, full coverage.

instant.title: Instant Setup
instant.desc: Get your subscription link immediately after purchase. Import into any compatible app in seconds.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: VLESS is a lightweight, high-performance proxy protocol that is more efficient than traditional VPN protocols. It is designed to be fast, secure, and resistant to detection.
faq.q2: How many devices can I connect?
faq.a2: Each subscription allows up to 3 devices simultaneously. You can configure any combination of phones, laptops, tablets, or other devices.
faq.a3: We accept card and bank transfers via YooKassa, cryptocurrency via 0xProcessing, and Telegram-based crypto payments via CryptoBot.
faq.q4: How do I connect after purchasing?
faq.a4: After purchase, you receive a unique subscription link. Open the subscription link from your dashboard, import the link into any compatible app specified in the subscription panel, and you are ready to go.
faq.a5: Yes. From the subscription details page, click "Extend Subscription" to add more time to your current plan. Your existing token and configuration remain unchanged.
